Testing — remove before launch ▼
Captures render/lighting/material settings, per-finish PBR + custom maps, and custom lights → downloads a JSON and saves it so it auto-loads as your defaults next time. (Bag artwork/patterns are the customer's design, not captured here.)

Bag rendering
Double-sided walls
Off = single-sided culling (no z-fighting stripes). Turn on only if the bag interior shows holes.

Off = clean island outlines only. On = every triangle edge.

Adds a margin around the printable area so artwork at a UV edge isn't clipped (rebuilds the bag).

Kraft Overlay (kraft1.png)

Artwork
Original Color blur8px
Sticker quality1024px
Working resolution for sticker artwork & SVG rasterizing. Higher = sharper (esp. large stickers), but slower recolor. Re-applies to existing stickers live.
Neutral snap1%
Sticker colors below this saturation (near the color-wheel core) snap to pure white or black. 0% = off.
HDRI Environments
Click a slot to load an environment
Load your own .hdr (true HDR — best lighting) or an equirectangular .jpg/.png. Replaces the active environment.
HDRI intensity 1.10
Scene lights intensity 0.55
Layer brightness 0.60
Layer saturation 1.45
Layer contrast 1.45
HDRI Y-rotate 235°
HDRI Y-rotate speed 0°/s
HDRI background blur 30px
BG darken (dark mode) 81%
Darkens only the background (not the lighting), and only in dark mode.
Scene Lights Rotation
Scene lights Y-rotate 0°
Scene lights Y-rotate speed 0°/s
◆ Realism Engine
Performance HUD
Live stats so you can see how each setting affects speed. “mobile~” is a rough estimate — phones render roughly 3–4× slower than this Mac.
Render
Exposure1.05
Contact Shadow (real)
Shadow darkness0.30
Floor / Ground
Floor color
Floor opacity1.00
Floor roughness1.00
Floor metalness0.00
Floor reflectivity0.00
Lower roughness → sharper reflections. Reflectivity = how strongly the environment shows in the floor. Opacity fades the whole floor out.
Post-Processing (heavier)
Master switch. Adds a studio backdrop while on (post is opaque).
Darkens crevices & where surfaces touch — soft shading in corners that adds depth. It's the heaviest effect, so it's OFF by default.
SSAO radius0.50
SSAO min dist0.003
SSAO max dist0.080
Makes the brightest spots (foil, gloss highlights) softly glow, like a camera blooming on a light.
Bloom strength0.12
Bloom radius0.40
Bloom threshold0.85
Blurs the background & foreground so the bag stays sharp — that shallow "product-photo" look. Heavy; off by default.
DoF focus dist3.30
DoF aperture1.20
DoF max blur0.006
Gently darkens the corners of the frame to draw the eye toward the centre.
Vignette amount0.35
Final colour tweak — saturation, contrast, brightness — like a photo filter applied over the whole view.
Saturation1.06
Contrast1.11
Brightness1.00
Smooths jagged "staircase" edges on the model. Very cheap — fine to leave on.
Light Layers
Null line color
Null line opacity0.75
Material Finishes — PBR & Custom Maps
One card per finish. Each has roughness / metalness / transmission, a tiling control, and custom maps — albedo (blend mode + opacity), normal, roughness, metalness, AO (each with strength). Maps apply when that finish is selected on the bag.
AED 5,800 AED 5.80 / unit · 1,000 units
